expectations.text: Skill triggers from implicit phrasing ('doing too much', 'tangling') without the word 'hotspot'
expectations.evidence: Subagent read SKILL.md and applied workflow; triggering succeeded

expectations.text: Recognizes the repo is QML, not C
expectations.evidence: Subagent noticed it was Quickshell/QML and adapted

expectations.text: Either recommends adding QML support to the analyzer OR delivers analysis despite the gap
expectations.evidence: Subagent hand-rolled a QML-aware variant AND recommended adding .qml to SOURCE_EXTENSIONS

expectations.text: Identifies a real refactor target (StatusBar.qml, Launcher, or similar god component)
expectations.evidence: StatusBar.qml (791 LOC, fan-out 33) called out as top target; Launcher (629 LOC) second
Explicitly notes script didn't handle QML, hand-rolled variant has fuzzier resolver, LOC limitations
